items.title: Some news…
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Some news…

Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell remain OUT for the Hawks tonight against the Grizzlies in Vegas.

No injury distinctions for those three.

Jacob Toppin (not with team), RayJ Dennis (Achilles) and Keshon Gilbert (adductor) also out.
